name: MembershipRecorder

neutralConcepts: group.type read from DB (xiigen-groups) — NOT from request
PRIVATE group → PENDING state → emit MembershipPending
PUBLIC group → ACTIVE state → emit MembershipActivated

ironRules.rule: SETNX on membership:{userId}:{groupId} — duplicate join returns success (idempotent), not failure.
group.type read from xiigen-groups DB — never from request payload. Client cannot declare a group as PUBLIC.
PRIVATE group: store membership with status=PENDING, emit MembershipPending. MembershipActivated must NOT be emitted for PRIVATE groups.
DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE any emit (MembershipActivated or MembershipPending).

keywords: membership recorder SETNX group type DB PRIVATE PENDING PUBLIC ACTIVE storeDocument before emit
